tests.key: Greeting › renders the name in the headline
Greeting › omits the subtitle when no subtitle prop is given
Greeting › increments the counter on click
ADMIN_COLLECTIONS › lists the five editable folder collections in order
ADMIN_COLLECTIONS › gives every collection a non-empty label
dashboardTotals › sums counts and reports the collection count
dashboardTotals › returns zeros for an empty card list
dashboardTotals › counts empty collections without adding to the total
dashboardSummaryText › summarizes a populated dashboard
dashboardSummaryText › uses the singular entry for a count of one
dashboardSummaryText › shows the empty-state nudge when there is no content
dashboardSummaryText › treats a negative total as empty
ADMIN_GATE_STORAGE_KEY › is the stable admin-unlocked key
isPasscodeCorrect › accepts an exact match
isPasscodeCorrect › rejects a wrong value
isPasscodeCorrect › trims surrounding whitespace on the input
isPasscodeCorrect › trims surrounding whitespace on the expected value
isPasscodeCorrect › never matches an empty expected passcode
isPasscodeCorrect › is case-sensitive
toEventDate › returns a Date instance unchanged
toEventDate › parses an ISO date string into a Date
formatEventDate › formats an ISO date as Month D, YYYY
formatEventDate › formats a Date instance the same as its ISO string
formatEventDate › does not zero-pad single-digit days
splitEvents › returns upcoming events sorted soonest first
splitEvents › returns past events sorted most recent first
splitEvents › handles an empty event list
splitEvents › treats an event exactly at now as upcoming
splitEvents › returns no past events when all are upcoming
splitEvents › does not mutate the input array order
galleryRevealImmediately › animates when IntersectionObserver exists and motion is allowed
galleryRevealImmediately › reveals immediately when the user prefers reduced motion
galleryRevealImmediately › reveals immediately when IntersectionObserver is unavailable
galleryRevealImmediately › reveals immediately when both reduced motion and no observer
galleryStaggerDelay › returns zero for the first column
galleryStaggerDelay › staggers later columns by 60ms each
galleryStaggerDelay › wraps the delay per row of five columns
galleryStaggerDelay › respects a custom column count
initGalleryReveal › reveals every tile immediately under reduced motion
initGalleryReveal › reveals every tile immediately when IntersectionObserver is missing
initGalleryReveal › observes tiles instead of revealing them when animation is enabled
initGalleryReveal › is a no-op when there are no gallery tiles
buildMailto › builds a bare mailto when only a recipient is given
buildMailto › appends the subject as a query parameter
buildMailto › encodes spaces in the subject as %20 rather than plus
buildMailto › includes both subject and body when supplied
buildMailto › handles a body with no subject
parallaxOffset › returns a negative offset for a section below the viewport top
parallaxOffset › returns zero when the section is flush with the viewport top
parallaxOffset › returns a positive offset for a section scrolled above the viewport top
parallaxEnabled › enables parallax for fine-hover devices without reduced motion
parallaxEnabled › disables parallax on non-fine-hover touch devices
parallaxEnabled › disables parallax when the user prefers reduced motion
parallaxEnabled › disables parallax for touch devices with reduced motion
initParallax › pins the banner image to the viewport on a fine-hover desktop
initParallax › leaves the image untouched on a non-fine-hover device
initParallax › leaves the image untouched when the user prefers reduced motion
initParallax › is a no-op when there are no parallax images
initials › returns two-letter initials for a two-word name
initials › returns one letter for a single-word name
initials › uses only the first two words for a three-word name
initials › upper-cases lowercase names
initials › ignores surrounding and repeated whitespace
initials › returns an empty string for an empty name
sortBoardMembers › orders members by ascending order value
sortBoardMembers › treats a missing order as zero
sortBoardMembers › returns a new array without mutating the input
sortBoardMembers › returns an empty array for no members
splitRole › splits a role on the middot into two lines
splitRole › trims whitespace around the separator
splitRole › returns a single-element array when there is no separator
splitRole › splits every occurrence of the separator
splitRole › returns a single empty string for an empty role
withBase › leaves an internal path unchanged when the base is root
withBase › keeps the root path as a single slash when the base is root
withBase › prefixes the subpath base onto an internal path
withBase › maps the root path to the base under a subpath
withBase › preserves a hash fragment on an absolute path under a subpath
withBase › passes external http URLs through untouched
withBase › passes mailto links through untouched
withBase › passes a bare hash anchor through untouched
landing image base paths › prefixes every internal landing image with the project base on a subpath deploy
landing image base paths › leaves every internal landing image unchanged at the domain root
landing image base paths › does not double-prefix a path that already carries the base
